name: Worktree Janitor
summary: Audit, clean, and reclaim disk space from stale git worktrees in a multi-agent monorepo. Triggered by "clean up worktrees", "free disk space", "worktrees are…
description: Audit, clean, and reclaim disk space from stale git worktrees in a multi-agent monorepo. Triggered by "clean up worktrees", "free disk space", "worktrees are full", "remove stale branches", "disk is full before build", or proactively when disk < 3 GB before any iOS build. Identifies merged branches, removes them safely, frees DerivedData, and reports space gained.
author: marvelousempire
